hero.title: Spiritual
hero.subtitle: A modern hub for worship, community, and education in the heart of Oslo. Connecting hearts through faith and innovation.

prayer.sectionSubtitle: Accurate timings for Oslo, Norway based on the local calculation method.

services.quranDesc: Weekly classes for children and adults to learn Tajweed and Tafseer.
services.charityDesc: Supporting local families and international causes through Zakat and Sadaqah.
services.eventsDesc: Lectures, youth programs, and family gatherings every weekend.

donate.sectionSubtitle: Your generous contributions help us build the new mosque, provide educational programs, and support our community outreach initiatives.
donate.securityNote: Secure payment processed by Stripe. All transactions encrypted.
donate.pageSubtitle: Invest in your Akhirah through sustainable projects. Join over 2,500 active members in Oslo building the future of our community.
donate.soundSystemDesc: Enhancing audio for prayers and lectures

contact.visitDesc: Located in the heart of Oslo, blending Nordic minimalism with spiritual serenity.
contact.experienceDesc: Take a digital walkthrough of our prayer halls before your visit. Experience the blend of modern design and timeless spirituality.
contact.inquiryDesc: Have a question about visits, events, or community services?

servicesPage.pageDescription: Explore the educational programs and Islamic learning opportunities at Masjid Rahma.
servicesPage.rahmaSchoolDesc: A structured Islamic education program for children and youth. Students learn Quran recitation, Arabic language, and Islamic studies in a supportive and nurturing environment.
servicesPage.darsDesc: Regular Islamic lectures and lessons for adults covering Quran tafseer, hadith, fiqh, and seerah. Open to all members of the community seeking to deepen their knowledge of Islam.

hub.newMosqueDesc: Support the construction of our new mosque and community center.
hub.servicesDesc: Rahma School, Dars, and Islamic learning programs.
hub.contactDesc: Get in touch for visits, events, or community services.

membership.pageDescription: Register as a member of Masjid Rahma. Your information is sent securely and is not stored on our servers.
membership.formDescription: Fill in your details below. All fields are required.
membership.privacyNote: 11 digits, required for government registration. Sent securely and not stored on our servers.
membership.successMessage: Thank you for your membership application. The mosque administration will process your registration.
membership.errorGeneral: Something went wrong. Please try again.

notFound.message: The page you are looking for does not exist or has been moved.

footer.brand: Connecting the community through faith, education, and service since 1995.
footer.newsletterDesc: Subscribe to receive updates on prayer times and events.
